function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-02-17
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-17                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md` by extracting visible invoice fields and line items from the note, preserved the existing body content below the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` explicitly asked for OCR-style extraction into YAML frontmatter for a single invoice file. The target file contained all required invoice schema fields and line-item data; these were migrated according to `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and migration workflow guidance, with the original body retained unchanged. Cleanup deletion of the inbox item is required by inbox workflows after successful completion.
